title: Punjab and Haryana High Court – Clerk – 1265 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Haryana High Court Clerk Vacancy 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 1265 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Haryana High Court Clerk Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 1265 vacancies. Candidates can apply online only from 26.05.2026 to 23.06.2026 through Haryana High Court website sssc.gov.in.
basic_details.application_mode: Online only at www.sssc.gov.in under "Clerk Subordinate Courts of Haryana"

qualification.education_qualification: No person who has entered into or contracted a marriage with a person having a spouse living, or who (having a spouse living) has entered into a marriage with any person shall be eligible. Exception: only if such marriage is permissible under the personal law applicable to such person as certified by the Hon'ble High Court.

selection_process: Online Written Examination / Computer Based Test (CBT) + Computer Proficiency Test (CPT) + Checking of Original Testimonials / Interaction
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply in online mode only at www.sssc.gov.in under the head "Clerk Subordinate Courts of Haryana". No other means/mode of submission of application will be accepted. The online application form is submitted only after payment of fees. All applicants (including reserved category) can submit only one application per category - if more than one application is submitted, only the latest application will be considered.
